data.title: Strong Ad Trends And Political Spending Boost Are Positive Catalysts For Roku, JP Morgan Analyst Says
data.description: JP Morgan analyst raises estimates for Roku ahead of Q3 results, increases price target to $92 with Overweight rating. Strong Platform results expected, reaffirmed outlook for accelerated growth.

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee Downplays Inflation Uptick, Economists Hold Steady On November Rate Interest Rate Cut Call
data.description: Despite a slight increase in inflation and a spike in jobless claims, experts focus on cooling price pressures and a softening labor market.

data.title: What's Going On With Pineapple Energy Shares Thursday?
data.description: Pineapple Energy stock is trading higher on Thursday after its subsidiary SUNation Energy announced an exclusive partnership with Empire Automotive.

data.title: Celsius Holdings Stock Is Surging Thursday: What's Going On?
data.description: Celsius Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:CELH) shares are trading higher Thursday, bouncing back from steep losses in recent quarters. Here's a look at what's going on.
